post.description: Registers a new user in the system with the provided user details.

get.description: Fetches the user details associated with the specified user ID.

post.description: Adds a new item to the user's shopping cart.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to be added to the cart.

example.error: Failed to add item to the cart.

get.description: Fetches all items in the user's shopping cart associated with the given user ID.

delete.description: Removes a specified item from the user's shopping cart.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Identifier of the product to remove from the cart.

example.error: Failed to remove item from cart.

put.description: Updates the quantities of items in the user's shopping cart.

requestBody.description: Details of items and quantities to be updated in the cart.

example.error: Quantity must be a positive number.

get.description: Fetches the payment details associated with the specified payment ID.

example.error: Payment with ID pay789 not found.

post.description: Handles incoming payment notifications through a webhook.
This endpoint allows you to initiate a payment transaction for a purchase.

get.description: Fetch a list of all available products in the inventory.

200.description: List of all products retrieved successfully.

500.description: Internal server error while fetching products.

post.description: This endpoint allows you to add a new product to the catalog.

500.description: Internal server error while adding product.

get.description: Fetch detailed information about a specific product using its ID.

500.description: Internal server error while fetching product details.

get.description: Search for products based on various criteria including category, price range, and sorting options.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Authorization token for validating the request.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category to filter the products by, e.g. electronics.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to fetch in a paginated response.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by, e.g., price, name.

200.description: Products retrieved successfully based on search criteria.

500.description: Internal server error during product search.

post.description: Allows users to place an order for products that they want to purchase.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the user placing the order.

401.description: Unauthorized user trying to place an order.

500.description: Internal server error while placing order.

get.description: Fetch details of a specific order using its ID.

500.description: Internal server error while fetching order details.

delete.description: Cancel an existing order using its ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the order to be canceled.

500.description: Internal server error while canceling order.

get.description: Get a list of all orders placed by a specific user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the user whose orders are to be retrieved.

404.description: User or orders for the user not found.

500.description: Internal server error while fetching user orders.

post.description: This endpoint allows a user to add a new shipping address to their profile.

500.description: Internal server error while adding address.

put.description: Allows a user to update details of an existing shipping address using its unique identifier.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the shipping address to be updated.

requestBody.description: The new details of the shipping address.

sample.description: An example request to update a shipping address

error.example: Address with ID addr_12345 not found.
Error updating the address due to server issues.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieve the current shipping status and history of an order using its unique identifier.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to be tracked.

200.description: Current shipping status and tracking history of the order.

error.example: Order with ID order_98765 not found.
Error retrieving order tracking information due to server issues.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment in the system.

gatewayResponse.description: Response received from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Identifier for the transaction within the payment gateway.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: Date and time the order was created, in ISO 8601 format.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order total amount.

userId.description: Identifier for the user who made the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after applying discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for the order.

updatedAt.description: Date and time the order was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

createdAt.description: Date and time the user account was created, in ISO 8601 format.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

userType.description: Type of the user, e.g., customer, admin.

updatedAt.description: Date and time the user account was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the order.

price.description: Price of a single product unit.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for the product.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart.

price.description: Price of a single product unit in the cart.

discount.description: Discount applied to the product price in the cart.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart.

lastUpdated.description: Date and time the tracking status was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the tracked order.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date, in ISO 8601 format.

status.description: Current status of the package shipment.

trackingId.description: Unique identifier for the package tracking.

totalAmount.description: Total amount of all items in the cart before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to items in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code for all the cart items.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user who owns the cart.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts for the cart.

updatedAt.description: Date and time the cart was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

country.description: Country where the address is located.

createdAt.description: Date and time the address record was created, in ISO 8601 format.

phone.description: Contact phone number for the address.

addressType.description: Type of address, such as home, work, etc.

name.description: Name of the person associated with the address.

state.description: State or province of the address.

addressLine.description: Full address line containing street and number.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user related to the address.

addressId.description: Unique identifier for the address entry.

updatedAt.description: Date and time the address record was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

active.description: Indicates if the user's account should be active.

userType.description: The classification of the user, e.g., guest, registered.

createdAt.description: Date and time the product was added to the catalog, in ISO 8601 format.

price.description: Current selling price of the product.

rating.description: Average rating based on customer reviews.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for sale.

description.example: A high-definition 4K television with smart features.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

stock.description: Number of units available in stock.

updatedAt.description: Date and time the product information was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

rating.description: Expected rating once the product is reviewed.

available.description: Whether the product is available for customers.

description.description: Description of the product including key features.
description.example: Compact wireless earbuds with noise cancellation.

currency.description: Currency code applicable to the product price.

stock.description: Available inventory count for the product.

quantity.description: Number of product units to add or update in the cart.

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product to update in the cart.

operation.description: Operation to perform, e.g., add, remove, update.

amount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with the payment.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used, e.g., credit card, PayPal.

currency.description: Currency code for the payment amount.

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway to process the transaction.

pincode.description: Postal code for the location of the address.

phone.description: Contact phone number for this address.

city.description: City where the address is located.

addressType.description: Type of address (e.g., home, shipping, billing).

name.description: Name of the person or entity the address is recorded for.

state.description: State or province of the address.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user associated with the address.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the payment was initiated, in ISO 8601 format.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the associated order.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to complete the payment.

currency.description: Currency in which the payment was processed.

transactionId.description: Unique transaction identifier from the payment gateway.
